title: Rocketman Closes In
description: Robin’s decision and the crew’s determination collide as the Sea Train carries everyone closer to Enies Lobby.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Kokoro, Sanji. Robin’s decision and the crew’s determination collide as the Sea Train carries everyone closer to Enies Lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And it's carrying quite a few people...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: and then climb out through the window.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They all know of your reasons!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Before you made this stupid deal,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What're you yelling about, nice Nico Robin?

summary: Robin’s decision and the crew’s determination collide as the Sea Train carries everyone closer to Enies Lobby.
